name: iliaal/php_clickhouse
description: Native PHP extension for ClickHouse using the official ClickHouse/clickhouse-cpp client. Connects over the native TCP protocol with LZ4 / ZSTD compression and optional TLS.

authors.name: SeasX Group (original SeasClick)
authors.role: Original author of SeasClick which php_clickhouse forks from

configure-options.name: enable-clickhouse-openssl
configure-options.description: Enable TLS/SSL support (requires OpenSSL development headers)
